headline: Roivant Announces Genevant Sciences’ and Arbutus Biopharma’s $2.25 Billion Global Settlement With Moderna
summary: Moderna to pay Genevant and Arbutus $950 million upfront and an additional $1.3 billion contingent upon a favorable resolution of Moderna’s Section 1498 appealIf the $1.3 billion payment is realized, this settlement will be the largest disclosed patent settlement paid in the pharmaceutical industry and the second largest in any industrySettlement holds Moderna accountable for infringement and provides for the court to enter judgment of no invalidity on the four Genevant/Arbutus patents asserted

headline: Pfizer Oncology Milestones Reshape Outlook Beyond COVID 19 Revenues
summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) and Astellas reported Phase 3 data showing PADCEV plus Keytruda delivered significant clinical benefits in muscle-invasive bladder cancer. The combination was associated with substantial reductions in risk of recurrence or death and higher complete pathological response rates. Pfizer also received full FDA approval for its BRAFTOVI-based regimen as a first-line treatment for BRAF V600E-mutant metastatic colorectal cancer. These oncology milestones position BRAFTOVI-based...
